channel.title: Harness-Engineering on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Harness-Engineering on Junho Lee

item.title: Reliability Through Control: The Core of Harness Engineering
item.description: Explore how harness engineering builds reliable AI coding agents by designing strict closed-loop control systems, automated verification, and deep runtime observability.

item.title: Control Structures for Trustworthy Autonomous Coding Tools
item.description: How harness engineering keeps coding agents bounded, observable, and safe enough for real work.
